I didn’t attend anything at msg, but it is next door to penn station, and when I arrived, the area was full of activity.
I was there before the knicks were in the finals, and before the 
World Cup started. But it was Friday night, and the entire area
Was full of activity.

Expensive! A beer costed 25 bucks and double gin tonic 50 bucks. Wow!
Getting in and out was very fast even though it was sold out Lady Gaga gig! Impressive!

It was cool to see a Rangers game there but the layout of this place is weird, especially upstairs. Definitely seems more like a basketball venue and not hockey. Still great history and atmosphere. Just some weird views and angles.
